languages.text: "Дух сей машины находится в глубокой тоске. Предлагаю повторную попытку воззвания к нему. Способ: прочтение Литании Призыва".

traits.locale_text: "Дух сей машины находится в глубокой тоске. Предлагаю повторную попытку воззвания к нему. Способ: прочтение Литании Призыва".

languages.text: "The spirit of this machine is in grievous anguish. Proposing a renewed attempt to appeal to it. Method: recitation of a Litany of Invocation."
languages.original_text: "Дух сей машины находится в глубокой тоске. Предлагаю повторную попытку воззвания к нему. Способ: прочтение Литании Призыва".

traits.locale_text: "The spirit of this machine is in grievous anguish. Proposing a renewed attempt to appeal to it. Method: recitation of a Litany of Invocation."
"The spirit of this machine is in grievous anguish. Proposing a renewed attempt to appeal to it. Method: recitation of a Litany of Invocation."
"The spirit of this machine is in grievous anguish. Proposing a renewed attempt to appeal to it. Method: recitation of a Litany of Invocation."

languages.text: 「この機械の魂は深い苦悩に陥っている。魂に訴えかける新たな試みを提案する。方法：祈りの文を唱える」
languages.original_text: "The spirit of this machine is in grievous anguish. Proposing a renewed attempt to appeal to it. Method: recitation of a Litany of Invocation."

languages.text: "Bu makinenin ruhu derin bir ızdırap içinde. Ona yeniden yakarılması öneriliyor. Yöntem: Yakarış İlahisi okunması."
languages.original_text: "The spirit of this machine is in grievous anguish. Proposing a renewed attempt to appeal to it. Method: recitation of a Litany of Invocation."

traits.locale_text: "Bu makinenin ruhu derin bir ızdırap içinde. Ona yeniden yakarılması öneriliyor. Yöntem: Yakarış İlahisi okunması."

languages.text: “此机魂正备受煎熬。建议再度尝试与其沟通。方法：念诵《祈唤颂歌》。”
languages.original_text: "The spirit of this machine is in grievous anguish. Proposing a renewed attempt to appeal to it. Method: recitation of a Litany of Invocation."

traits.locale_text: “此机魂正备受煎熬。建议再度尝试与其沟通。方法：念诵《祈唤颂歌》。”

languages.text: "Der Geist dieser Maschine hat starke Schmerzen. Schlage einen neuerlichen Behandlungsversuch vor. Methode: Litanei der Anrufung."
languages.original_text: "The spirit of this machine is in grievous anguish. Proposing a renewed attempt to appeal to it. Method: recitation of a Litany of Invocation."

traits.locale_text: "Der Geist dieser Maschine hat starke Schmerzen. Schlage einen neuerlichen Behandlungsversuch vor. Methode: Litanei der Anrufung."

languages.text: « L'esprit de cette machine est en proie à une profonde angoisse. Proposition : nouvelle tentative d'interpellation. Méthode : récitation d'une litanie d'invocation. »
languages.original_text: "The spirit of this machine is in grievous anguish. Proposing a renewed attempt to appeal to it. Method: recitation of a Litany of Invocation."

traits.locale_text: « L'esprit de cette machine est en proie à une profonde angoisse. Proposition : nouvelle tentative d'interpellation. Méthode : récitation d'une litanie d'invocation. »

languages.text: «El espíritu de esta máquina sufre una terrible angustia. Propongo un intento renovado de apelar a él. Método: recitación de Letanía de invocación».
languages.original_text: "The spirit of this machine is in grievous anguish. Proposing a renewed attempt to appeal to it. Method: recitation of a Litany of Invocation."

traits.locale_text: «El espíritu de esta máquina sufre una terrible angustia. Propongo un intento renovado de apelar a él. Método: recitación de Letanía de invocación».
